assertions.title: Full mission lifecycle succeeds end to end

steps.expected: Mission transitions from draft to approved, approvedAt recorded
steps.observed: Status changed to approved, approvedAt timestamp present

steps.expected: Feature transitions through in_progress -> in_review -> completed
steps.observed: Feature f1 successfully transitioned through all states

steps.expected: Assertion status changes from pending to passed
steps.observed: Assertion f1-assertion-1 updated to passed status

steps.expected: Milestone seals when all assertions passed
steps.observed: Milestone m1 sealed successfully, progress shows 100% assertion completion
Checkpoint 20260330-053158-036 saved with feature and assertion states

steps.expected: Latest checkpoint loaded with warning about metadata-only restoration
steps.observed: Checkpoint loaded with appropriate warning about filesystem/git state not being restored
Single checkpoint returned in proper JSON structure

outputs: All commands returned valid JSON output
Mission state transitions reflected in outputs
Progress indicators correctly calculated and displayed
Checkpoint warning message present in load output

steps.expected: Returns session info or appropriate error
steps.observed: Returns proper JSON error with hints: 'No session detected'
Returns initialized: true, gitAvailable: true, cassAvailable: true
Returns git: ok, cass: ok, global-config: ok, project-config: warn
Note saved with timestamp, git_branch, and content
Correctly returns error 'Session ID required' with helpful hints

steps.expected: Returns empty results or error when no handoffs
steps.observed: Returns 'No handoffs found to search' with hint
Returns count: 0, deleted: false (no handoffs to clean up)
Returns 'No picked-up handoffs to report on' with hint

outputs: status: initialized: true, gitAvailable: true, cassAvailable: true
doctor: Array of checks with ok/warn status
note: Saved note with timestamp, branch, content
handoff: Error with 'Session ID required' and hints
handoff-dig: Error 'No handoffs found to search' with hint
handoff-report: Error 'No picked-up handoffs to report on' with hint

summary: Tested 2 assertions: Both passed. VAL-CROSS-001: Full mission lifecycle completed successfully including create, approve, feature transitions, validation, milestone sealing, and checkpoint operations. VAL-CROSS-003: All existing non-mission commands (session, status, doctor, note, handoff, handoff-dig, handoff-cleanup, handoff-report) continue to work correctly after Mission Control command registration.
